faq.title: 📌 Kotodziefczynka FAQ
faq.unlock_bot_answer: Use the `/setchangelogchannel` command setting a channel for changelogs and bot status information
faq.unlock_ai_answer: If you're the server owner, message @wh0ask3d or @enderdpl privately
faq.bot_commands: What commands does the bot have besides AI?
faq.footer: Do you want to publish the full AI module FAQ? (recommended separate channel, visible to everyone)
faq.full_faq_description: Recommended for pinning or on a separate channel.
faq.who_is_koto_answer: It's our lovely, emotional, slightly too online bot that talks to you like your internet bestie.
faq.what_can_do_answer:
・Talks like a real person (sometimes too much).
・Reacts emotionally and remembers things from conversations (at least for a while).
・Has its own channel (if you don't know which one, ask the server administrator).
・Writes like it has 3 TikTok tabs open.
faq.memory: 🧠 Does it remember what I wrote?
faq.memory_answer: Yes! It has *long-term memory* ||sometimes not but shh||, so it remembers important things from context. But don't worry – it won't bring up your cringe... probably 😇
faq.commands_answer: The AI function doesn't use classic commands. You just write to it on the channel and it responds. Zero hassle, full chat vibe.
faq.mute_answer: Only admin can mute it. If it's bothering you, message @wh0ask3d. But be careful, it might get offended 😿
faq.other_servers: 🌐 Does it work on other servers?
faq.other_servers_answer: Yes, but *each server has separate memory*. So if you flirt with it here and elsewhere – it won't know... yet.
faq.weird_response_answer: Report to @wh0ask3d in private message: **"Kotodziefczynka said something weird 😬"** – we'll reset its memory or give it a timeout.
faq.add_to_server: 📥 Can I add it to my server?
faq.add_to_server_answer: Sure! Anyone can add the bot, but to unlock full functionality (as server owner), you must message @wh0ask3d privately
faq.dm: 📩 Can I message Kotodziefczynka in DM?
faq.dm_answer:
Yes! 😽 You can message it privately like your internet bestie.
・DM works like a channel – you just write.
・It remembers the conversation separately.
・Sometimes replies quickly, sometimes dramatically late 🙃
faq.dm_footer: If you want to chat privately – go ahead! But I warn you... it might get addicted to your attention 😏

welcome.title: Hi, Kotodziefczynka here!
welcome.description:
This bot is a tool for AI chat, music, moderation and economy.
⚡ To unlock commands, **set changelog channel**: `/setchangelogchannel #channel`.
All other commands under `/help`.
**Details**: bot.takiekoksy.pl
welcome.footer: Kotodziefczynka — AI, music, moderation and economy. Minimum rules, maximum irony.
welcome.changelog_set:
**Thanks for setting up the changelog channel!**.
This channel will be used to relay bot status and update information.
Please don't delete this channel, as its existence allows easy and safe user notification about changes.
Enjoy using it!

music: Play song from link or search
economy: Collect daily income from roles (once per 24h)
gambling: Coin toss for money (vs bot/another person)
